entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0011.6831] It is expected that NetIncomeLoss with a value of -2,068,060 reported in the network role http://mkd.com.tw/role/StatementsOfCashFlows should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, ProfitLoss with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:RetainedEarningsMember and a reported value of -1,589,628 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://mkd.com.tw/role/StatementsOfChangesInEquityDeficit. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss fact are:
Period : 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of NetIncomeLoss : 0 Decimals of ProfitLoss : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - formf-1.htm 5934

[DQC.US.0011.6832] It is expected that NetIncomeLoss with a value of -2,068,060 reported in the network role http://mkd.com.tw/role/StatementsOfCashFlows should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, ProfitLoss with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:ParentMember and a reported value of -1,589,628 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://mkd.com.tw/role/StatementsOfChangesInEquityDeficit. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss fact are:
Period : 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of NetIncomeLoss : 0 Decimals of ProfitLoss : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - formf-1.htm 5934

[DQC.US.0011.6831] It is expected that NetIncomeLoss with a value of -1,217,086 reported in the network role http://mkd.com.tw/role/StatementsOfCashFlows should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, ProfitLoss with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:RetainedEarningsMember and a reported value of -1,256,278 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://mkd.com.tw/role/StatementsOfChangesInEquityDeficit. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss fact are:
Period : 2022-01-01 to 2022-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of NetIncomeLoss : 0 Decimals of ProfitLoss : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - formf-1.htm 5934

[DQC.US.0011.6832] It is expected that NetIncomeLoss with a value of -1,217,086 reported in the network role http://mkd.com.tw/role/StatementsOfCashFlows should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, ProfitLoss with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:ParentMember and a reported value of -1,256,278 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://mkd.com.tw/role/StatementsOfChangesInEquityDeficit. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss fact are:
